caption: priya did u leave the good coffee in the cabinet or did u take it to the library again bc i have tutoring at 3 AND gov meeting after and i cannot
lmaooo it's in the cabinet top shelf. also amara texted me abt the meeting agenda — sounds like a long one 😬
of course it does. anyway thx. also do we have food bc i haven't eaten since like 10
there's leftover rice from yesterday. brian it's 2pm
yes thank you i'm aware. been in back-to-back classes since 8, Writing Center isn't gonna tutor itself
ok ok eat before you leave. marcus texted btw, asked if you're free friday
tell him probably yes but i gotta check if chidi is calling this week — he does that thing where he calls at 7 and just talks for an hour
😂 put him on speaker and come back to earth. eat the rice!!

3 miles at dawn on the Euclid loop. lungs cold. brain quiet.
the coffee shop at the library reopened. iced oat latte era continues.
amara's transit proposal made it through committee. tiny wins.
sunday cooking with @priyameta - fried rice edition. she said it needs more scallion.
the bird library rotunda at 11pm is a specific kind of beautiful.
marcus made me stop working at 10. reader, i was mad about it. for 4 minutes.
post-midterm walk. the leaves finally turned.
found the last carrel on floor 4. checkmate.
policy memo section 2 is fighting me. we go again tomorrow.
the department comped us bagels. a good day.
study group at westcott. all outlines. no chill.
syracuse pizza ranking update: still varsity #1. do not @ me.
the water bottle is full. mom, this is for you.
post-run stretch at manley. hip says thank you.
moving through voss's reading list one article at a time.
amara graduated. i am so proud. the gap she leaves is real.
sunday phone call with mom and dad. same time same channel.
the housing market in syracuse is a horror movie. lease renewed. crisis averted.
someone stole my usual carrel. betrayal.
night stretch on the ostrom loop. the trees are almost bare now.
voss said 'this is finally reading like a paper.' i wept.
priya says my beef stew still needs work. next attempt sunday.
the SGA transit subsidy passed. transit is a right, not a luxury.
sunday cooking - miso salmon. objectively the best one so far.
the finals week caffeine budget is officially blown.
marcus finished his capstone. proud of him.
one last paper. then break.
the ride to rochester on the 20th. the first quiet in weeks.
christmas eve at grace community. mom cried a little. so did i.
chin chin, plantain chips, and a nap. this is my winter break.
the internship interview went okay. going to know soon.
spring registration done. sleep next.
the euclid loop at sunrise in snow. syracuse in winter has range.
coach called it a moderate run. my legs called it a war.
at bird library on a saturday. this is who i am.
priya's plants have taken over the living room. i welcome the greenery.
amara sent me a job posting for after graduation. maybe.
the writing center pens are new. someone finally listened.
the tutor huddle before the 3pm block. energy check.
voss's syllabus is finally aligned with the actual reading list.
cooking sunday - chickpea curry. priya vetoed the extra chili.
quiet study block on skytop road. the reservoir is frozen.
midterm survived. one down.
post-run at meadowbrook. the mud was legendary.
the SGA meeting ran to 8. i am so tired.
coffee shop windows fogged up in the cold. everyone is inside.
reading kingman by candlelight because the power flickered.
the library elevator is broken again. cardio.
priya made pancakes. this is a good saturday.
the walk home from the library is my favorite meditation.
syracuse january is a personality. i've made peace with it.
SGA committee minutes review took forever. worth it.
coffee, outline, repeat.
marcus in his engineering shop with sawdust in his hair. cinema.
the constitutional law brief is done. one more to go.
sunday cooking - pesto pasta. priya said 'more lemon.' she is right.
the walk to hall of languages on a snow day feels ceremonial.
voss meeting went well. we have a plan.
midterm week ended. eating a real meal for the first time in days.
the ostrom trees are bare now. everything looks like a poem.
amara graduation photos. she looks so free.
priya's family sent us diwali sweets. a good week.
marcus took me to see the geese at onondaga. bird brained love.
the writing center holiday party. brief. good energy.
sunday cooking - lentil soup. served over the finals crisis.
the finals week playlist is 12 hours of lo-fi. no talking.
policy paper submitted. i can feel my shoulders again.
the ride home for winter break. every mile a decompression.
christmas morning at home. mom made puff-puff. dad handed me a book.
emeka's college essays are almost done. proud of him.
grace community christmas eve service. same pew. same feeling.
the drive back to syracuse january 5. quiet snow. quiet thoughts.
spring semester starts monday. one last read of the syllabus.
the internship interview - felt sharp. we'll see.
voss office hours. one of my favorite hours of the week.
the writing center intake sheet is nine names deep. we're busy.
sunday cooking - shrimp fried rice. priya said i finally got the scallion right.
the SGA senator recruitment drive is underway. spring cohort inbound.
the euclid run in ice grips. no falls. small victory.
the sunset from bird floor 5 window. i keep coming back for it.
cold brew at recess coffee. a personality trait.
the mother of a study buddy sent me cookies for helping her son. i cried a little.
coach voss handed me a chapter to review. she trusts me. i want to earn it.
the SGA post-meeting debrief at westcott. the coffee was terrible. the conversation wasn't.
priya and i redecorated the shelf. it's the same shelf but now it has a plant.
the poli sci senior thesis panel handed me an intake slot. someone asked for me by name.
the sga transit subsidy launched formally today. a small good thing exists in the world.
the winter run through thornden park was a cathedral.
